mapper.sql: c.id, c.article_id, c.parent_id, c.user_id, c.content, c.status, c.create_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM comment c WHERE c.id = #{id}
SELECT , u.nickname as username, u.avatar as user_avatar FROM comment c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.parent_id = #{parentId} ORDER BY c.create_time ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment (article_id, parent_id, user_id, content, status) VALUES (#{articleId}, #{parentId}, #{userId}, #{content}, #{status})
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment
AND status = #{status}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE article_id = #{articleId} AND status = 1
